coverage_notes: Two-way curl in src-tauri/src/curlgen.rs, faithful to engine.rs (brand promise request 1:1 = curl). to_curl(spec, redact): -X omitted for GET / emitted otherwise; --url carries enabled query params + ApiKey-in-query, percent-encoded (NON_ALPHANUMERIC) exactly like engine::url_with_query so _ -> %5F etc.; -H per enabled header; Body Raw -> Content-Type header + --data-raw, FormUrlencoded -> --data-urlencode per field, Multipart -> -F name=value / -F name=@path(;type=...); auth Bearer -> -H Authorization: Bearer, Basic -> -u user:pass, ApiKey header -> -H, ApiKey query folded into url, SigV4 -> '# signed with AWS SigV4' comment + placeholder X-Amz-* / Authorization headers; options follow_redirects -> -L --max-redirs N, insecure -> -k, ca_bundle -> --cacert, compressed -> --compressed, timeout_ms -> --max-time seconds. Output is multi-line (backslash-newline between flags). SECURITY: (a) redact=true masks Authorization/Cookie/X-Api-Key/Proxy-Authorization header values + Bearer/Basic-password/ApiKey values + token/password-named form fields -> bullets; (b) shell_quote() POSIX single-quotes anything unsafe, ALWAYS quotes empty and any value starting with '-' or '@', escapes embedded ' as '\''; dangerous query values are percent-encoded inside the quoted --url ('-evil' -> %2Devil, '@/etc/passwd' -> %40%2Fetc%2Fpasswd) so they can never detach into a bare flag/file arg. from_curl(command): shell-words tokenization after stripping trailing-backslash line-continuations and '#' comment lines (so a multi-line Chrome DevTools 'Copy as cURL' parses); recognizes -X/--request, -H/--header, -d/--data/--data-raw/--data-binary/--data-ascii, --data-urlencode, -F/--form, -u/--user, -b/--cookie, -L, -k/--insecure, --compressed, --max-time, --max-redirs, --cacert, --url and a bare URL; supports --flag=value and --flag value; unknown flags ignored (no arity guess) so it never errors on options we don't model; method = explicit -X else POST when a body is present else GET; -u -> Basic; Authorization: Bearer -> Bearer (header consumed); Content-Type header moved onto Body::Raw (not left as a duplicate header) so round-trip is a fixed point; url query split back into decoded query_params; id = uuid v4. 29 unit tests: shell_quote (bare-safe / leading dash+@ quoted / embedded quote / empty+spaces), to_curl (GET no -X, POST -X, params folded+encoded, dangerous value sanitized, headers+raw body, Basic -u, multipart text+file, all option flags, SigV4 comment), redaction (Bearer / Authorization header / ApiKey query value masked, no leak), from_curl (GET+params, POST inferred from -d, explicit method wins, Basic from -u, Bearer from header consumed, multipart, unknown flags ignored, multi-line DevTools command, options), round-trip to_curl->from_curl->to_curl stable for GET+params / POST JSON+headers / Basic / multipart. cargo fmt clean, cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, full suite 121 passed / 2 ignored (lib) + 14 integration. Only src-tauri/src/curlgen.rs touched (lib.rs/models.rs/Cargo.toml untouched). All tests offline.
